name: Spark Energy Minerals Inc.
description: Spark Energy Minerals Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on acquiring and evaluating battery metal assets. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration of lithium and rare earth elements, with a significant land position in Brazil's Lithium Valley. Through its flagship Arapaima Project and other regional interests, Spark Energy Minerals aims to capitalize on the growing global demand for critical minerals essential for energy-related applications, leveraging efficient exploration strategies to identify and develop high-potential mineral deposits within established mining jurisdictions.
